name: Dream Restaurant Tycoon
description: Build the restaurant of your dreams in Dream Tycoon! Take customer orders, grab the right food from preparation stations, and deliver meals fast to earn money. Unlock more tables, expand your restaurant, and open exciting new drive-thrus as your business grows. Manage busy rush hours, keep customers happy, and make smart upgrades to turn a small food stand into a massive restaurant empire. Easy to play, fun to master, and packed with rewarding progression can you become the ultimate restaurant tycoon?
instructions: Pick up food from the correct station Deliver the right order to customers Earn money from successful deliveries Use money to buy tables and unlock expansions Serve customers quickly and accurately
